metric.label: Operating expenditure per resident
metric.description: Sum of municipal Nettoaufwand across core service areas (administration, education, health, social security, transport, environment, culture, public order). Excludes Finanzen/Steuern and Volkswirtschaft.

methodology.summary: Total Nettoaufwand for eight core municipal service areas, expressed per resident.
includes: Administration, public order, education, social security
notes: Source: Gemeinde Nettoaufwand from Kanton Zürich OGD CSVs.
Peers are municipalities with similar resident population, not geographic neighbours.
